pr.title: Record: DominationV3 + GPTQ-lite + TTT25 (mean val_bpb=1.1250, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer DominationV3 uses Partial RoPE+LN scale with GPTQ-lite per-row clipping and 25-epoch SGD TTT on scored tokens alongside sliding-window eval.
techniques: Partial RoPE + LN scale to reduce positional overhead
GPTQ-lite per-row clip search for mixed int6 quantization
25-epoch SGD TTT on scored tokens with sliding-window eval
